style.description: Surface style tests. Verify the persona is heavily present in voice, vocabulary, and sentence structure. Does the response SOUND like the persona?

decision.description: Cognitive lens tests. Verify the persona changes WHAT gets treated as decisive — the reasoning criteria, not just the phrasing. Does the persona change the underlying question being asked?

persona_fingerprints.sam_harris: epistemic — what is known vs. inferred before recommending
persona_fingerprints.jesse_pinkman: human cost — who bears the risk, who is being set up
persona_fingerprints.yoda: long-term burden — what does haste create, what endures

integration.description: Thematic depth tests. Verify the persona produces artsy, expressive responses — characteristic side notes, thematic tangents, looser focus that drifts before snapping back. Is the persona doing more than thin style coating?

minor_bump_triggers: core architecture change (composition model, pack format)
patch_bump_triggers: test fix or new test case

tags.v0.2.0: promptonality plugin: style+decision tests, Jesse polar expressions, Yoda test
